title: Together Epoch
description:
Together Epoch（共同时代）——大型多人冒险整合包。探索史诗地形，挑战强力Boss，钻研科技魔法，与好友共创生存传奇。极致优化，联机流畅。
large-scale multiplayer adventure modpack featuring epic terrain, powerful bosses, technology, magic, and optimized performance for smooth multiplayer.
body:
English Version

Together Epoch

Large-scale multiplayer adventure pack for Minecraft 1.19.2 Forge
Explore epic landscapes, challenge powerful bosses, delve into tech and magic — with friends.

---

📦 What is Together Epoch?

Together Epoch is a carefully crafted multiplayer‑focused modpack that blends exploration, combat, technology, and magic into a seamless survival experience. Every mod has been chosen and tested for compatibility and performance, so you and your friends can enjoy a stable, thrilling world together.

⏱️ Dozens of hours of development have gone into balancing, optimizing, and refining this pack — it's built for the community, by a player.

---

✨ Features

· 🌍 Boundless World – Terralith + Oh The Biomes You‘ll Go create stunning new landscapes, while YUNG’s Better structures make every dungeon feel fresh.
· ⚔️ Epic Battles – Face massive bosses (Bosses of Mass Destruction), mutated mobs (Mutant Monsters), and a revamped Ender Dragon.
· ⚙️ Tech & Magic – Automate with Create, manage items with AE2, and cast complex spells with Hex Casting.
· 🚀 Optimised Multiplayer – Embedded optimisations (Embeddium, Starlight, Entity Culling) keep TPS high even with many players.
· 🎮 Quality of Life – JEI, Jade, Xaero's Minimap, Mouse Tweaks, and more make gameplay smooth and intuitive.

---

🛠️ Installation

1. Install Minecraft 1.19.2 and Forge 43.5+.
2. Drop the modpack into your versions folder.
3. Launch – all mods will download automatically from Modrinth.

⚠️ First launch may take a few minutes; be patient.

---

🖥️ Requirements

· OpenGL 4.3+ compatible GPU (Intel HD 500 series / NVIDIA GeForce 400+ / AMD Radeon HD 7000+).
· 4 GB RAM allocated to Minecraft.
· Updated graphics drivers.

---

❓ FAQ

Q: Can I add more mods?
A: Yes, but compatibility isn't guaranteed. Back up your world first.

Q: Multiplayer ready?
A: Absolutely. Designed for servers – client and server both need the pack.

Q: Crash on startup?
A: Update your GPU drivers and check your RAM allocation.

---

⚖️ Copyright & Disclaimer

This pack is Modrinth‑native – all mods are referenced directly from Modrinth‘s CDN and remain the property of their respective authors.
The pack itself (configuration, scripts, documentation) is All Rights Reserved.

If you are a mod author and have concerns, please contact me via Modrinth DM – I'll respond promptly.

Together Epoch is the result of dozens of hours of work, made possible by the amazing modding community. Thank you!

---

🇨🇳 中文版

Together Epoch | 共同时代

Minecraft 1.19.2 Forge 大型多人冒险整合包
探索史诗地形，挑战强力 Boss，钻研科技魔法 —— 与好友共创传奇。

---

📦 这是什么？

Together Epoch 是一个专为多人联机设计的整合包，将探索、战斗、科技与魔法融为一体。每个模组都经过兼容性与性能测试，让你和朋友们能一起享受稳定、刺激的生存世界。

⏱️ 数十小时的开发打磨，只为呈现更平衡、更流畅的多人体验。

---

✨ 特色

· 🌍 广阔世界 – Terralith + Oh The Biomes You‘ll Go 重塑主世界，YUNG’s 系列让地牢不再重复。
· ⚔️ 激燃战斗 – 史诗 Boss（Bosses of Mass Destruction）、变异怪物（Mutant Monsters）、重制末影龙。
· ⚙️ 科技魔法 – Create 自动化、AE2 存储管理、Hex Casting 咒术体系。
· 🚀 多人优化 – Embeddium、星光、实体剔除等模组保障高 TPS 流畅联机。
· 🎮 生活细节 – JEI、Jade、小地图、鼠标手势…… 应有尽有。

---

🛠️ 安装方法

1. 安装 Minecraft 1.19.2 与 Forge 43.5+。
2. 将整合包放入 versions 文件夹。
3. 启动游戏，所有模组将从 Modrinth 自动下载。

⚠️ 首次启动较慢，请耐心等待。

---

🖥️ 硬件要求

· 支持 OpenGL 4.3+ 的显卡（Intel HD 500 系列 / NVIDIA GeForce 400+ / AMD Radeon HD 7000+）。
· 为游戏分配 4GB 以上内存。
· 更新显卡驱动。

---

❓ 常见问题

问：能自己加模组吗？
答：可以，但兼容性需自行测试，建议先备份存档。

问：支持服务器吗？
答：支持，服务端和客户端都需要安装本包。

问：启动崩溃怎么办？
答：更新显卡驱动，检查内存分配。

---

⚖️ 版权声明

本整合包为 Modrinth 原生包，所有模组均引用自 Modrinth CDN，版权归原作者所有。
整合包本身的配置、脚本等原创内容 保留所有权利。

若您是模组作者并认为作品被不当使用，请通过 Modrinth 私信联系，我将第一时间处理。

数十小时的开发，离不开模组社区和每一位玩家的支持。感谢你们！
